name: Chocolate Drop Cookies (C&h)
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine shortening, sugar, and egg in a mixing bowl; beat well.
2. Add melted chocolate, buttermilk, and vanilla; blend.
3. Sift together flour, soda, and salt and stir into the mixture.
4. Add chopped walnuts; chill the soft dough.
5. Drop teaspoonfuls of the dough onto a greased baking sheet.
6. Bake at 350 degrees for 12 to 15 minutes or until done.
- Makes 3 to 4 dozen soft, rich cookies.
- Frost if desired.
